name: Wade McKinney

contactInfo.office: 100 E. Tyler St., Suite 100, Athens, TX 75751

bio: Wade McKinney serves as the Henderson County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Henderson County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Athens area.
campaignPromises: Keep Henderson County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
